cards.title: Advanced System Engineering
cards.text: Trident Industries' engineering team specializes in cutting-edge hardware solutions that address the modernization priorities of the Department of Defense (DoD), including classified initiatives.

cards.title: Advanced Manufacturing
cards.text: Trident boasts a substantial manufacturing facility dedicated to the fabrication of ground support hardware.

cards.title: Integration and Enhancement
cards.text: Trident is at the forefront of developing cutting-edge defense hardware, including advanced land systems and a wide array of innovative solutions.
